data.title: Global Threat Monitoring
data.description: Netflix implements extensive global monitoring for potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Advanced telemetry and monitoring solutions for threat intelligence.

data.title: Encryption Standards
data.description: Strong encryption protocols are used to protect data at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.2 and AES-256 encryption standards for secure communication.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Robust IAM systems ensure that access is controlled and audited effectively.
data.technical_spec: Use of AWS IAM for defining roles and permissions management.

data.title: API Security
data.description: Security of APIs is a priority to protect against vulnerability exploitation.
data.technical_spec: Implementation of OAuth and continuous scanning for API security issues.

data.title: Data Privacy Regulations
data.description: Compliance with global data privacy laws to protect user data.
data.technical_spec: Enforcement of GDPR, CCPA, and other relevant privacy frameworks.
